Records.description: Two-loop non-planar three-point function with one massless and two off-shell external legs (p1^2=0, p2^2 != 0, q^2 = s != 0) and four massive internal propagators of equal mass m, relevant for non-planar corrections to H+jet production through a massive fermion loop. The family has two master integrals which satisfy a coupled second-order homogeneous differential equation in d=4 in the variables x = -s/m^2, y = -p2^2/m^2 (Eqs. 4.5, 4.6). The maximal cut is computed by first cutting the inner one-loop box and then localizing the remaining two delta-functions, yielding a homogeneous solution F1 ~ (x-y)/sqrt(x^2 - 2x(y+8) + y^2) * EllipticK((x-y)^2/(x^2-2(y+8)x+y^2)) (Eq. 4.18). A second independent solution F2 is obtained from EllipticK(1-w). The single off-shell limit p2^2 -> 0 reproduces the homogeneous solution of the corresponding non-planar two-loop triangle with one off-shell leg.
Records.familyName: two-loop non-planar triangle with two off-shell legs and four massive propagators
